decisions.rationale: Auto-exit: position_review=REDUCE hold=4/10 alpha=LOW, DA risk=8/10 reject=True — 3-signal override of PM HOLD

wash_sale_presale.note: loss exit within 30d of purchase — IRS §1091 wash sale: the loss is DEFERRED onto the replacement basis, not lost. ALLOWED (capital-risk exit outranks tax timing); flagged for accounting/audit.
